metadata.title: Claude Code MCP - Sources
metadata.description: Official documentation for MCP configuration and development in Claude Code

official_documentation.name: MCP Specification (November 2025)
official_documentation.description: Latest spec with CIMD, Enterprise-Managed Authorization, incremental scopes, Streamable HTTP

official_documentation.name: MCP Specification (June 2025)
official_documentation.description: Previous spec with Streamable HTTP, OAuth 2.1, structured outputs

official_documentation.name: MCP SDK Documentation
official_documentation.description: TypeScript SDK for building MCP servers

official_documentation.name: MCP Best Practices
official_documentation.description: Architecture and implementation best practices for MCP servers

official_servers.name: MCP Servers Repository
official_servers.description: Official MCP server implementations (PostgreSQL, filesystem, git, etc.)

official_servers.name: MCP Registry (Preview)
official_servers.description: Open catalog and API for MCP server discovery (launched September 2025)

tutorials.name: Building MCP Servers Guide
tutorials.description: Step-by-step guide to building MCP servers

tutorials.name: 15 Best Practices for MCP Servers in Production
tutorials.description: Production deployment patterns, Docker containerization, zero-trust model

tutorials.name: MCP Cloud Deployment Guide (Ekamoira)
tutorials.description: Cloudflare Workers, edge deployment, remote MCP server hosting

tutorials.name: MCP on AWS
tutorials.description: AWS deployment patterns for MCP servers

security.name: State of MCP Server Security 2025 (Astrix Research)
security.description: Research: 53% use insecure secrets, 8.5% OAuth adoption, MCP Secret Wrapper solution

security.name: MCP Security Complete Guide (HiveTrail)
security.description: CVE-2025-6514, prompt injection attacks, zero-trust model, production security

security.name: MCP November 2025 Authorization Spec (Aaron Parecki)
security.description: CIMD, DCR deprecation, Enterprise IdP integration, incremental scopes

security.name: MCP Auth Updates (March 2025)
security.description: OAuth 2.1 requirement, Resource Indicators (RFC 8707), token security

security.name: MCP Security Risks and Challenges (Data Science Dojo)
security.description: Toxic flow analysis, MCP-scan tool, prompt injection case studies

research.name: Radiologist Copilot: Orchestrated Tools Pattern (2025)
research.description: Agentic AI with tool orchestration - patterns applicable to MCP server design

research.name: PPTArena: Tool Routing Benchmark (2025)
research.description: Agent routing between programmatic and deterministic tools - MCP design patterns
